data.body: NOTE (path/name update 2026-04-27): gate scripts have been relocated and renamed. Old: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh and gate-2d-dependency-check.sh. New: plugins/dso/scripts/fix-bug/blast-radius.sh and plugins/dso/scripts/fix-bug/dependency-check.sh. Wire-format gate_id JSON values ('2b', '2d') unchanged. See ADR 0006 revision note.
